mapper.insert: insert into homework ( title, content, course_id, teacher_id, publish_time, deadline, status ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{publishTime}, #{deadline}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
select
h.id as id,
h.title as title,
h.content as content,
h.course_id as courseId,
c.course_name as courseName,
h.teacher_id as teacherId,
u.real_name as teacherName,
h.deadline as deadline,
h.status as status
from homework h
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join user u on h.teacher_id = u.id
order by h.id desc
mapper.update:
update homework
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
course_id = #{courseId},
deadline = #{deadline},
status = #{status}
where id = #{id}
